name: Mammography — Screening Overdue (Women 40+)
message: Mammography screening overdue. Annual screening recommended for women aged 40 and older.
actionRequired: Schedule mammography. Discuss screening preferences and shared decision-making per USPSTF B-grade recommendation.
sourceAuthority: USPSTF 2024 Recommendation Statement — Breast Cancer Screening

name: Colonoscopy — Screening Overdue (Adults 45-75)
message: Colonoscopy screening overdue. 10-year interval recommended for average-risk adults aged 45-75.
actionRequired: Schedule colonoscopy or offer alternative CRC screening (FIT annually, CT colonography every 5 years) per patient preference.
sourceAuthority: USPSTF 2021 Recommendation Statement — Colorectal Cancer Screening

name: Cervical Cancer Screening — Overdue
message: Cervical cancer screening overdue. Pap test every 3 years or co-test every 5 years recommended (ages 21-65).
actionRequired: Schedule Pap smear and/or HPV co-testing. Discuss screening interval based on age and prior results.
sourceAuthority: USPSTF 2018 Recommendation Statement — Cervical Cancer Screening

name: HbA1c — Annual Monitoring Overdue (Prediabetes/Diabetes)
message: HbA1c monitoring overdue. Annual testing recommended for patients with prediabetes or diabetes.
actionRequired: Order HbA1c. Assess medication adherence, lifestyle factors, and glycemic targets.
sourceAuthority: ADA Standards of Diabetes Care 2024, Section 6: Glycemic Goals

name: Lipid Panel — Screening Overdue (Adults 40+)
message: Lipid panel overdue. 5-year screening interval recommended for average-risk adults.
actionRequired: Order fasting lipid panel. Calculate 10-year ASCVD risk if not done recently.
sourceAuthority: ACC/AHA 2019 Guideline on Primary Prevention of Cardiovascular Disease

name: Blood Pressure — Annual Check Overdue
actionRequired: Measure blood pressure at next visit. Reinforce lifestyle modification if elevated.
sourceAuthority: USPSTF 2021 Recommendation Statement — Hypertension in Adults: Screening
